title: phragmipedium anguloi
intro: Phragmipedium anguloi, also known as the Angulo's Phrag, is a species of orchid native to South America. It is prized for its unique, angled petals and delicate fragrance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Phragmipedium anguloi can be prepared as a tea or tincture, which are often used to promote overall health and wellness, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function.
